{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603231553395C0E0EE457EC5DB6E45C"}"},"total":42},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7402831749976785688","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"比电影多了更多的细节，看到最后才反应过来这是本自传，搜了一下作者的真实经历更加离奇，最后招安功成身退。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1723609075,"group_id":"6983311869855419423","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"看文评价打分皆不中立不客观，纯看本人当下看完的心情，请勿回评。","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N3+EXe5OmH6cnOrcP6hqfWZ9kCeEXYfgimhSEIp1jZS4","gender":2,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":2,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/c352cd6a5b6f4cabb9c260d4fc95baf8~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776796152&x-signature=FGLqgAXSCuCRbYigA8NPP0bBjJs%3D","user_id":"3437487168695204","user_name":"别推烂梗小白文给我了"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"3437487168695204","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"6983311869855419423","book_info":{"abstract":"莱昂纳多·迪卡普里奥、汤姆·汉克斯主演同名电影《猫鼠游戏》原著小说。每个人的成长都是疯狂的，有些人还顺便逼疯了全世界。12岁时小弗兰克父母离异，15岁他从父亲那骗了3400美元，此后这一数字迅速攀升。在21岁前，他伪装了六年飞行员、一年生、九个月律师、三个月大学教授;骗了250万美元、250架次飞行、160万公里、N个姑娘......他成为FBI历史上最年轻的通缉犯，被誉为20世纪最伟大的诈骗艺术家，也造就了一个世纪以来最疯狂最可爱的的世纪成长故事。当他想洗手退隐时，却发现自己就像在飞快的转盘上，骑着失控的旋转木马不停打转.....","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-images/5a39ccff16157a2d42379c276c24f881~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"（美）弗兰克·W.阿巴格内尔；斯坦·雷丁 著；徐晓蕴 译","author_id":"","book_id":"6983311869855419423","book_name":"猫鼠游戏","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#c0b0b0","creation_status":"0","genre":"6","genre_type":"160","read_count_text":"5.7万人读过","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"0","category_schema":"[{"category_id":45,"name":"影视小说","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=45&name=影视小说&genre_type=160&gender=2&source=detail"},{"category_id":992,"name":"国外影视","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=992&name=国外影视&genre_type=160&gender=2&source=detail"},{"category_id":166,"name":"科幻小说","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=166&name=科幻小说&genre_type=160&gender=2&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7534927970280934425","read_count":"713","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"159408"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"9.4","serial_count":"13","tags":"影视小说,国外影视,科幻小说","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-images/5a39ccff16157a2d42379c276c24f881~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779436420&x-signature=MOsqFBWkXE91FZbEuRMnaaVH0J4%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"0","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"20"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603231553395C0E0EE457EC5DB6E45C"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"8","score_suffix_text":"阅读2小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":13,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":6384,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":3148},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7373928443978973961","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"他的聪明才智和大胆行为令人佩服，但也为他感到惋惜。我喜欢他在不同身份间切换的情节，真是太刺激了！这本书不仅是一个关于诈骗的故事，更是一个关于成长和自我发现的传奇。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1715835468,"group_id":"6983311869855419423","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N+TEIJSFVXLMddwKKE3EQrI=","gender":2,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":2,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/7b92beed15144f519898bfe689051d51~tplv-1yzifmftcy-expand:200:0:0.png","user_id":"873485132637289","user_name":"爱吃烟台粽子的武震南"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"873485132637289","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"6983311869855419423","book_info":{"abstract":"莱昂纳多·迪卡普里奥、汤姆·汉克斯主演同名电影《猫鼠游戏》原著小说。每个人的成长都是疯狂的，有些人还顺便逼疯了全世界。12岁时小弗兰克父母离异，15岁他从父亲那骗了3400美元，此后这一数字迅速攀升。在21岁前，他伪装了六年飞行员、一年生、九个月律师、三个月大学教授;骗了250万美元、250架次飞行、160万公里、N个姑娘......他成为FBI历史上最年轻的通缉犯，被誉为20世纪最伟大的诈骗艺术家，也造就了一个世纪以来最疯狂最可爱的的世纪成长故事。当他想洗手退隐时，却发现自己就像在飞快的转盘上，骑着失控的旋转木马不停打转.....","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-images/5a39ccff16157a2d42379c276c24f881~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"（美）弗兰克·W.阿巴格内尔；斯坦·雷丁 著；徐晓蕴 译","author_id":"","book_id":"6983311869855419423","book_name":"猫鼠游戏","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#c0b0b0","creation_status":"0","genre":"6","genre_type":"160","read_count_text":"5.7万人读过","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"0","category_schema":"[{"category_id":45,"name":"影视小说","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=45&name=影视小说&genre_type=160&gender=2&source=detail"},{"category_id":992,"name":"国外影视","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=992&name=国外影视&genre_type=160&gender=2&source=detail"},{"category_id":166,"name":"科幻小说","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=166&name=科幻小说&genre_type=160&gender=2&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7534927970280934425","read_count":"713","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"159408"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"9.4","serial_count":"13","tags":"影视小说,国外影视,科幻小说","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-images/5a39ccff16157a2d42379c276c24f881~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779436420&x-signature=MOsqFBWkXE91FZbEuRMnaaVH0J4%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"0","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":""},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603231553395C0E0EE457EC5DB6E45C"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"8","score_suffix_text":"阅读3小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":1,"forwarded_count":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":10800,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":978},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7477772946588484414","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"非常好看，实在不敢相信我花费了六天去阅读这本与网络文学相比字数少得可怜的书籍。
对主角的人生十分向往，但碍于现实，我只好在脑海里演绎这一场场跌宕起伏的故事，而他们的主角还不是我。
希望有一天哪怕我没有亲身经历过，也能以另一种方式将故事呈现出来。
（话说我都已经忘记是什么时候看的电影了，与阿甘正传的电影版前天看完，第三天就看完小说版截然不同，这次耽误了好长时间。）"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1741066193,"group_id":"6983311869855419423","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"可以在发现我的评论下和我说关注我的原因吗？","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2NxT5HWUMrU61aeSANES3NxY=","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/78bc3a81135f4b1cb28fce618970403c~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776788555&x-signature=wE8uheYqXG4HgYNJsCk8tpQGuTU%3D","user_id":"61274757145","user_name":"青兰墨瑶"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"61274757145","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"sticker":{"expire_time":1722308320,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"","bg_color":"#FFF3DD","can_worn":false,"id":2,"name":"永不书荒","small_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/2c704b96a929a7a8b3461ddbf49a8d01","sticker_type":1,"url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/b93ef223f8131d9ee8e8312f642d9681"}},"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"vip","icon":"{"icon_default_url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/0a6117024b55cf7a088043cdb8fa5d48","icon_dark_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/9d81e6d86e7f5048ab14f7f77e72ac0f","icon_width":26,"icon_height":16}","intro":"{"title_name":"vip","title_id":"vip","icon_type":1}","is_author_title":false,"is_vip_title":true,"zh_title":"vip"},{"en_title":"author","intro":"{"title_name":"作家","title_id":"author"}","is_author_title":true,"is_vip_title":false,"label":"{"title_text":"作家","title_default_color":"#FFFFFF","title_dark_color":"#FFFFFF","bg_default_color":"{\"start\":\"#FF9F31\",\"end\":\"#FFB95C\"}","bg_dark_color":"{\"start\":\"#CC8029\",\"end\":\"#CC9349\"}","title_dark_diaphaneity":"CC"}","zh_title":"作家"}]}}},"expan
